texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Wild Hill at a glance
texts.text: Wild Hill at a glance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Wild Hill is an exclusive use property with five luxurious suites, each designed with the utmost attention to detail and comfort. Named simply after numerical Maasai numbers, each suite has a spacious lounge, with a coffee station, mini bar and fireplace, huge bedrooms with baths overlooking the vast plains. There are indoor and outdoor showers and verandah that stretch across the front of the suites, making the most of the views below.
texts.text: Wild Hill is an exclusive use property with five luxurious suites, each designed with the utmost attention to detail and comfort. Named simply after numerical Maasai numbers, each suite has a spacious lounge, with a coffee station, mini bar and fireplace, huge bedrooms with baths overlooking the vast plains. There are indoor and outdoor showers and verandah that stretch across the front of the suites, making the most of the views below.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The family suite, with two ensuite bedrooms and a shared living area set inbetween massive boulders.
texts.text: The family suite, with two ensuite bedrooms and a shared living area set inbetween massive boulders.

texts.text: Are [Ah- reh]:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Tucked down on the edge of the hill, in a colobus grove, set inbetween ancient fig trees.
texts.text: Tucked down on the edge of the hill, in a colobus grove, set inbetween ancient fig trees.

texts.orig: Set on the edge of the ridge with grassy knowles and looking over the rocky outcrops and vast plains beyond.
texts.text: Set on the edge of the ridge with grassy knowles and looking over the rocky outcrops and vast plains beyond.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Included: Full board accommodation, soft drinks, local beers, premium spirits and cellar wines, limited complimentary wellness treatments,  laundry,  airstrip  transfers  (Ngerende  airstrip)  and statutory taxes.
texts.text: Included: Full board accommodation, soft drinks, local beers, premium spirits and cellar wines, limited complimentary wellness treatments,  laundry,  airstrip  transfers  (Ngerende  airstrip)  and statutory taxes.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Activities Included: Unlimited game drives in Enonkishu, Ol Chorro and Lemek Conservancies, bush breakfast, picnics, Visit  the  Mara Training Centre, limited restorative wellness treatments, use of the fully equipped fitness centre, local school visits and sundowners.
texts.text: Activities Included: Unlimited game drives in Enonkishu, Ol Chorro and Lemek Conservancies, bush breakfast, picnics, Visit  the  Mara Training Centre, limited restorative wellness treatments, use of the fully equipped fitness centre, local school visits and sundowners.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Excluded: Champagne,  Hot-air  balloons,  Rhino  Sanctuary entrance  fees,  visit  to  the  Mara  Elephant  Project,  helicopter trips,  any other park or access fee for conservancies and the Masai Mara National Reserve outside of those catered for under activities  included,  photography lessons, camera hire and photoshoots, tips and donations.

texts.orig: ⑨ To make a provisional booking:
texts.text: ⑨ To make a provisional booking:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please  send  an  email  to  bookings@ collectioninthewild.com.  Y our  booking  will  be  held  provisionally  for  14 days.  The expiry date of the booking will be noted on the reservation summary that you are sent. You are required to confirm the booking pri -or to the expiry date otherwise it will automatically  expire.  If  you  require more  time  to  confirm  your  booking, the  expiry  date  may  be  extended once (on request).
